subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! Verily acceptance of the divine decree is the hallmark of them that are detached from all save God, and the path of those drawn unto the fragrances of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا ان الرضاء بالقضاء سمه اهل الانقطاع و سنه اهل الانجذاب بنفحات ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
